text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Aw yeah! We've finally made it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Look at that! It's a bit old, but this inn is
spectacular!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yep, it might be rustic but it's clean as a whistle!
That's how you know they're taking good care of
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I are in the middle of our
hot spring vacation. It all happened pretty
suddenly when she accosted me and declared...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! It's time to bust out our secret treasure
stash!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right, I'm talking about the hot spring
coupon! Now's the time to use it!
choice_data_list: You're right. It's about to expire.
You're right. It's about to expire.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Plus, it's time we take a break and reward
ourselves with some rest and relaxation...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Not! That's what you thought I was gonna say, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Everyone else might be dropping
their guards since things have quieted down, but
my fight continues!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This trip is where we kiss the laziness lurking
inside us goodbye! Goodbye laziness, hello
productivity! Now let's go, go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So that's how we ended up here. It's still pretty
early, so I suggest we start out with some
sightseeing.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, nice idea! Let's go say hi to the staff too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for welcoming us so warmly! This place
is so clean, I feel like I could eat off the floors!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's even more hyper than usual. No matter what
I say, I get the feeling she'll just drag me to
wherever she wants to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some sightseeing, we return to the hot
spring for a nice soak. Following that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Aaah, that felt so good! There's nothing like a hot
bath to get your fighting spirit blazing again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You know what I'm talking about, right? I bet you
do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She takes the passion from the bath and...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
When I surged forward at the end, it was like the
engine of my soul was going full throttle! That
race was the best! And then, do you remember
when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her voice booms through the inn as she recounts
race after race. They're told with such fervor that
I can't help but be sucked in. However...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And we've got plenty more memories like that to
come! Yeaaah! The springtime of our youth will
last foreveeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to get a little worried. If she stays
wound up for much longer, there's no way she'll
be able to fall asleep tonight...
choice_data_list: How about we watch some TV?
How about we watch some TV?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's a good idea! Even regular TV seems way
more special when you're watching at an inn!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's a high school drama! I wonder what the
story's about!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I see! So it's about a red-hot cheer squad
leader who clashes with the other students and
how that brings them all closer as friends!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Dang, that's so cool! The main character is just
like me! I didn't know they made this kind of show
these days!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If the main character is me... that makes the
strong, quiet one Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And the super serious member of the karate club
is Yaeno! And the younger student who puts their
all into everything is Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And the no-nonsense, strong-willed library
assistant's gotta be Ardan. So that leaves...
Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I just realized... there's no you.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If there were a teacher filled with red-hot passion,
maybe that would work for you... Nah, that's not
quite right.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I guess you could be the tough coach... Nope,
that won't work either 'cause you're way more
nice than you are strict.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you're the reliable best friend? That's not
it either. You're not just reliable, you're really
understanding and open-minded too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... It's really hard to pin down what you are
to me... Give me a second!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer is always guiding me and thinking about
what's best for me. And I can't think of anyone
more reliable...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (And sometimes they can be a little sloppy, but never for long. And it's only once in a while.)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(Not only that, they're also the only reason I was
able to meet my hot-blooded rivals and race
against them!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(As long as we're together, I feel like I can run full
speed ahead toward any dream I come up with!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (Someone like that's gotta be...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I gave it a bunch of thought, and I decided that
you're so many things to me. It's pretty much
impossible to assign you to a single character!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So I thought I should tell you the one thing I know
for certain!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If not for you, I never would have become the
person I am! And without you, I'll never will
become the person I'm going to be! So...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I HOPE YOU'LL STAY BY MY SIDE FOREVER
AND EVER!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Carried by her booming voice, her words pierce
my heart... and the eardrums of the inn's other
occupants.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Bamboo Memory and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
